title: Etsy Grew Sales 5.5% in Q1-2026, Services Revenue Grew 10.5%
text: Etsy reported Q1 2026 marketplace GMS growth of 5.5% year-over-year, reaching $2.46 billion, demonstrating a recovery from prior period declines. Notably, Services revenue grew even faster at 10.5% year-over-year, reflecting strong growth in higher-margin advertising and other services. Total Q1 revenue reached $631.3 million, up 3.1% from Q1 2025. The strong services revenue growth underscores Etsy's strategic pivot toward advertising and services that generate better margins than core marketplace transaction fees. Etsy Ads expanded significantly, with advertising representing an increasingly important component of revenue. The company's adjusted EBITDA margin reached 29% in Q1, exceeding guidance, demonstrating operational efficiency improvements. Active buyers showed sequential growth for the first time in two years, with the marketplace reaching 89.6 million active buyers by the end of Q1. The turnaround in buyer metrics combined with services growth confirms Etsy's strategic shift toward profitability and higher-return-on-capital initiatives.
